# Data Model: mos_target_mwm_tess_ob_parquet


MOS Target Table: mwm_tess_ob

## Basic Information
This table contains targets requested for the manual carton mwm_tess_ob.

### Naming Convention
$MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_mwm_tess_ob.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

### Releases
DR20

### Enviroments
MOS_TARGET

### Approximate Size
11 KB

### File Type
PARQUET

### Generated by Product
sdss5db targeting database.

### Is a VAC
False

### Data Level
2.3.3

### DATAFRAME List for release DR20
- Primary data frame.

---

## Changelog
Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

---
## Example DATAFRAME List

### Columns


#### gaia_dr2_id

- Column Name: gaia_dr2_id
- Description: Gaia DR2 unique source identifier
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int64


#### ra

- Column Name: ra
- Description: Right Ascension (J2000)
- Unit: degrees
- Data Type: Float64


#### dec

- Column Name: dec
- Description: Declination (J2000)
- Unit: degrees
- Data Type: Float64


#### h_mag

- Column Name: h_mag
- Description: 2MASS H-band mangitude
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float64


#### instrument

- Column Name: instrument
- Description: Instrument requested for this target (only APOGEE for this carton)
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### cadence

- Column Name: cadence
- Description: Cadence requested for this carton
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String
